name: simpro-mcp-server
description: Unofficial Simpro MCP server — query and manage quotes, jobs, customers, catalog, and line items from Claude. Not affiliated with Simpro.
long_description: An unofficial MCP server that exposes Simpro operations - quotes, jobs, customers, catalog, line items, and cross-collection aggregations to an LLM. Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or supported by Simpro. Runs locally over stdio. Authenticate with Simpro OAuth (authorization_code via a one-time browser login, or client_credentials) or an API key. Reaches all ~1,300 Simpro endpoints via a generic escape hatch plus a set of guided workflow tools.

base_url.title: Simpro base URL
base_url.description: Your specific Simpro build host, e.g. https://yourbuild.simprosuite.com — no trailing slash, no /api path.

company_id.title: Company ID
company_id.description: Your Simpro company id. Most single-company accounts are 0.

auth_mode.title: Authentication mode
auth_mode.description: How to authenticate to Simpro: authorization_code (User based browser login, recommended), client_credentials (Access to everything, no user impersonation), or api_key (not recommended).

client_id.title: Simpro OAuth client ID
client_id.description: Client ID of your Simpro OAuth app. Required for authorization_code and client_credentials modes.

client_secret.title: Simpro OAuth client secret
client_secret.description: Client secret of your Simpro OAuth app. Required for authorization_code and client_credentials modes.

auth_redirect_port.title: Auth redirect port
auth_redirect_port.description: Localhost port for OAuth flow. Must match the port of the redirect URI registered in Simpro (http://localhost:<port>/callback).

api_key.title: Simpro API Key
api_key.description: A standalone API key (Setup > Integrations > API). Only used when authentication mode is api_key.

default_page_size.title: Default page size
default_page_size.description: Rows per page for list tools when unspecified (1–250). Lower keeps results within Claude's context window.
